course.title: Computer Science
course.description: Introduction to programming and computer science

assignments.title: Python Basics
assignments.description: Variables, data types, conditionals, and loops

assignments.title: Python Classes
assignments.description: Defining and using classes in Python

assignments.title: Data Analysis
assignments.description: Basics of data analysis: loading, exploring, and visualizing data in Python.

assignments.title: Building REST APIs with FastAPI
assignments.description: Create a modern REST API using FastAPI framework with request validation, response models, and proper HTTP status codes.

assignments.title: Python Text Processing
assignments.description: Master text processing with strings, file I/O, and text manipulation techniques in Python.

assignments.title: Data Structures in Python
assignments.description: Master lists, dictionaries, sets, and tuples through practical exercises and real-world applications.

assignments.title: Python Data Visualization
assignments.description: Master data visualization using matplotlib and plotly to create professional charts and interactive graphs.

assignments.title: Statistics with Python
assignments.description: Master statistical analysis and data manipulation using pandas and numpy for exploratory data analysis.
